title: carduus nigrescens subsp. vivariensis
intro: Carduus nigrescens subsp. vivariensis, also known as Vivarian Spiny Thistle, is a subspecies of spiny thistle native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is a rich source of flavonoids and saponins, which are known to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Carduus nigrescens subsp. vivariensis include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its ability to support liver and kidney function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infusion, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
